title: Are Celtic & Hearts fans really rooting for their rivals?
summary: This article examines whether Scottish Premiership fans support their rivals in matches that could impact the league standings. Hearts lead the table, and the outcome of matches involving Hibs against Celtic and Rangers against Hearts could significantly shape the title race.
content: With Hearts out in front, Hibs could do the the Scottish Premiership leaders a favour against Celtic, while the defending champions will hope Rangers can do some damage at Tynecastle.

zh.title: 凯尔特人和心脏队的球迷真的支持他们的对手吗？
zh.summary: 本文探讨了苏格兰超级联赛球迷是否在可能影响联赛排名的比赛中支持他们的对手。心脏队领先积分榜，希布斯对凯尔特人和流浪者对心脏队的比赛结果可能会显著影响冠军争夺。

title: Bright reflects on 'incredible' 2022 Euros win
summary: Chelsea captain Millie Bright reflects on England's triumphant Women's Euros victory in 2022, describing it as the "best summer" of her life. The achievement represented a major milestone for English women's football on the international stage.
content: Speaking in 2022, Chelsea captain Millie Bright reflected on the "best summer of my life" and England's "incredible" Women's Euros victory.

zh.title: 布莱特反思2022年欧洲杯"不可思议"的胜利
zh.summary: 切尔西队长米莉·布莱特回顾了英格兰在2022年女子欧洲杯上的胜利，称其为她人生中"最美好的夏天"。这一成就代表了英格兰女子足球国际舞台上的重大里程碑。

title: Chelsea captain Bright retires - what now for ex-England defender?
summary: Chelsea captain and former England defender Millie Bright has announced her immediate retirement from professional football due to injury. The retirement marks the end of a career for one of England's notable defensive players in women's football.
content: Chelsea captain Millie Bright announces she has retired from football with immediate effect because of injury.

zh.title: 切尔西队长布莱特因伤退役——这位前英格兰后卫现在怎么办？
zh.summary: 切尔西队长和前英格兰后卫米莉·布莱特宣布因伤立即退役。这标志着英格兰女子足球著名后卫职业生涯的结束。

title: All I want to do is help as much as I can - Grealish
summary: England midfielder Jack Grealish discusses his expanded role as a Special Olympics GB ambassador and his commitment to supporting the organization. Grealish explains the personal significance of his ambassadorial work beyond his football career.
content: England midfielder Jack Grealish speaks to Joe Wilson about extending his Special Olympics GB ambassador role and what it means to him.

zh.title: "我想做的就是尽可能多地帮助" - 格雷利什
zh.summary: 英格兰中场球员杰克·格雷利什讨论了他作为特奥会英国大使的扩展角色以及他对支持该组织的承诺。格雷利什解释了他的大使工作在足球生涯之外的个人意义。

title: Who's next for Premier League relegation?
summary: BBC Sport's analysis examines the competitive battle at the bottom of the Premier League table and which teams are most at risk of relegation. The piece provides insight into the remaining fixtures and mathematical scenarios that could determine which sides drop down.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team looks at the Premier League relegation battle.

zh.title: 英超谁会降级？
zh.summary: BBC体育分析审视了英超联赛排名底部的激烈竞争，以及哪些球队最有可能被降级。这篇文章提供了对剩余比赛和数学情景的见解，这些情景可能决定哪些球队会降级。

title: Grealish recovery 'couldn't be looking any better'
summary: Jack Grealish provides an update on his recovery from foot surgery that ended his season, reporting that his rehabilitation is progressing excellently. The positive update suggests the midfielder may be on track for a timely return for the next campaign.
content: Jack Grealish says his recovery from the operation he had on his season-ending foot injury is going extremely well.

zh.title: 格雷利什的康复"看起来再好不过了"
zh.summary: 杰克·格雷利什对他从导致赛季结束的足部手术中恢复的情况进行了更新，报告说他的康复进展顺利。这个积极的更新表明这位中场球员可能有望在下个赛季及时回归。

title: Afghanistan women can return to competition
summary: Fifa has approved Afghanistan's women's football team to return to international competition, according to former captain Khalida Popal. The approval marks a significant moment for Afghan women's football, symbolizing resilience amid ongoing challenges in the country.
content: Afghanistan women will become a "symbol of resilience" after Fifa approved their return to international competition, says former captain Khalida Popal.

zh.title: 阿富汗女足获准重返国际赛场
zh.summary: 据阿富汗女足前队长卡利达·波帕尔透露，国际足联已批准阿富汗女子足球队重返国际赛事。这一批准对阿富汗女子足球具有重要意义，象征着在国内持续挑战中的坚韧精神。

title: Tavernier on list of Tottenham options - gossip
summary: Tottenham is reportedly considering Rangers captain James Tavernier as a potential free agent signing should the London club fail to secure Premier League survival. The transfer speculation suggests Tottenham is preparing contingency plans for various scenarios this season.
content: London club may move for Rangers skipper as free agent if they drop out of the Premier League...

zh.title: 塔弗尼尔列入热刺转会目标 - 传言
zh.summary: 据报道，如果伦敦俱乐部未能确保英超保级，热刺正在考虑将流浪者队队长詹姆斯·塔弗尼尔作为潜在的自由球员签约选项。转会传言表明热刺正在为本赛季的各种情况制定备选方案。

title: The Man Utd kids tipped to shine in pre-season
summary: BBC Sport identifies the young Manchester United players most likely to impress during the club's pre-season tour in July. The feature examines which academy prospects could force their way into consideration for first-team opportunities.
content: Which Manchester United youngsters are most likely to be pushing for inclusion on their pre-season tour in July?

zh.title: 曼联年轻球员有望在赛前季表现出色
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育频道指出了最有可能在俱乐部7月赛前季巡回赛中给人留下深刻印象的年轻曼联球员。这篇文章探讨了哪些青训前景可能会争取进入一队考虑范围的机会。

title: Reign ease concerns over Wales legend Fishlock
summary: Seattle Reign have addressed concerns about Wales legend Jess Fishlock's potential early retirement following an injury. The club's assurance about her future provides stability for both the player and team. This development is significant given Fishlock's prominence in women's soccer.
content: Seattle Reign allay fears that Wales legend Jess Fishlock's career could come to a premature end due to injury.

zh.title: 皇后队消解对威尔士传奇菲什洛克的担忧
zh.summary: 西雅图皇后队已解决对威尔士传奇球星杰斯·菲什洛克因伤可能提前退役的担忧。俱乐部对其未来的保证为球员和球队提供了稳定性。鉴于菲什洛克在女足中的重要地位，这一进展意义重大。

title: The Europa League winner turned director, actor, DJ and photographer
summary: Alfie Whiteman, a 27-year-old Europa League winner, has retired from professional football to pursue creative endeavors including photography, acting, and DJing. He is launching his inaugural photography exhibition, marking his transition from soccer to the arts. The move exemplifies an athlete's shift toward diverse passions beyond sports.
content: Alfie Whiteman picked up a Europa League winners' medal last year, now at 27 he has retired from football and is opening his first photography exhibition.

zh.title: 欧联杯冠军转身导演、演员、DJ和摄影师
zh.summary: 27岁的欧联杯冠军阿尔菲·怀特曼已从职业足球退役，转而从事摄影、表演和DJ等创意事业。他正在举办首个摄影展览，标志着从足球向艺术领域的转变。这一举动体现了运动员向体育以外多元热情的追求。

title: Copy of Don't nitpick, just marvel at the talent of PSG an...
summary: A recent semifinal showcased two exceptional teams with abundant talent, effective coaching, and creative freedom that prioritized entertaining play. The match demonstrated how well-coached squads can deliver compelling football when given tactical flexibility. This reflects appreciation for attacking, quality play in modern competition.
content: Tuesday's semifinal was a gift: two teams laden with talent, coached well and given the freedom to entertain.

zh.title: 别挑剔，尽管欣赏巴黎圣日耳曼的天赋
zh.summary: 最近的半决赛展示了两支拥有充足人才、执教得力、享有创意自由度且优先追求精彩表现的顶级球队。这场比赛表明训练有素的球队在获得战术灵活性时能够奉献精彩足球。这反映了现代竞争中对进攻型、高质量比赛的欣赏。

title: Can Griezmann end his Atletico love story in style?
summary: Antoine Griezmann's lengthy tenure at Atletico Madrid is approaching its end, with the midfielder seeking to cap his legacy with Champions League success. The French star's potential exit raises questions about how his storied career at the Spanish club will conclude. His final performances may define his entire Atletico chapter.
content: Antoine Griezmann's long love affair with Atletico Madrid is drawing to a close, but can the Frenchman bid farewell by securing the Champions League?

zh.title: 格列兹曼能否优雅地结束他与马竞的爱情故事？
zh.summary: 安托万·格列兹曼在马德里竞技的漫长生涯即将结束，这位中场球员正在寻求以欧冠胜利来完成他的遗产。这位法国巨星潜在的离开引发了关于他在西班牙俱乐部的传奇职业生涯如何收场的问题。他最后的表现可能会定义他在马竞的整个篇章。

title: Atlante hires Herrera to lead return to Liga MX
summary: Atlante has appointed Miguel Herrera as head coach as the club prepares for its return to Mexico's Liga MX top division. Herrera's hiring signals the team's ambitions for a successful reintegration into the highest level of Mexican football. The appointment reflects confidence in establishing competitive stability.
content: Atlante has named Miguel Herrera as its new head coach ahead of the club's return to the Liga MX top flight.

zh.title: 阿特兰特聘请赫雷拉领导回归墨西哥甲级联赛
zh.summary: 阿特兰特任命米格尔·赫雷拉为主教练，该俱乐部正在为回归墨西哥甲级联赛顶级联赛做准备。赫雷拉的聘用表明球队对成功重返墨西哥足球最高水平的雄心。这项任命反映了球队对建立竞争力稳定地位的信心。

title: Exiled Afghan women's team gets FIFA eligibility
summary: An Afghanistan women's refugee team has been granted FIFA eligibility to participate in international competitions, five years after fleeing Taliban rule. The decision enables displaced Afghan players to continue their careers through the international system. This development underscores support for women's football amid humanitarian challenges.
content: An Afghanistan women's refugee team has been granted eligibility for international competitions, some five years after national team players fled their country's Taliban rule.

zh.title: 流亡阿富汗女队获得国际足联资格
zh.summary: 一支阿富汗妇女难民队在逃离塔利班统治五年后，被授予了国际足联资格参加国际比赛。这一决定使流离失所的阿富汗女运动员能够继续通过国际体系进行职业生涯。这一进展强调了在人道主义挑战中对女子足球的支持。

title: Luis Enrique: PSG-Bayern 'best match' as coach
summary: PSG head coach Luis Enrique praised his team's 5-4 victory over Bayern Munich as the greatest match of his coaching career. The record-breaking result showcases the attacking prowess of both European giants in a Champions League semifinal.
content: Paris Saint-Germain head coach Luis Enrique hailed his side's record-breaking 5-4 win over Bayern Munich as the best match he's ever been involved in during his coaching career.

zh.title: 路易斯·恩里克：PSG对拜仁是其执教生涯中'最佳比赛'
zh.summary: 巴黎圣日耳曼主教练路易斯·恩里克将球队5-4击败拜仁慕尼黑的胜利称为其执教生涯中最伟大的比赛。这场创纪录的胜利展示了这两支欧洲豪门在欧冠半决赛中的进攻实力。

title: Banned Kompany's seat in PSG-Bayern epic 'no fun'
summary: Bayern Munich manager Vincent Kompany was unable to be in the dugout during the thrilling 5-4 Champions League semifinal against PSG. Kompany's absence from the sidelines deprived the manager of the opportunity to influence the game tactically during the dramatic encounter.
content: Vincent Kompany might have been the only spectator in the Parc des Princes who didn't enjoy watching the thrilling Champions League semifinal game between his Bayern Munich team and PSG.

zh.title: 被禁赛的科帕尼无法在PSG对拜仁史诗对决中坐镇教练席'很遗憾'
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑主教练文森特·科帕尼在与PSG的激烈5-4欧冠半决赛中无法坐在教练席上。科帕尼缺席场边，无法在这场戏剧性的对决中进行战术指挥。

title: Red cards for mouth-covering approved before WC
summary: FIFA has approved a new rule resulting in red card dismissals for players who cover their mouths when confronting opponents at the 2026 World Cup. The rule aims to improve visibility and enforce discipline during player confrontations.
content: Players who cover their mouths when confronting an opponent will be sent off at this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 遮挡嘴巴遭红牌罚下的规则在世界杯前获批
zh.summary: 国际足联批准了一项新规则，对在2026世界杯期间与对手对峙时遮挡嘴巴的球员进行红牌罚下。该规则旨在提高可见度并在球员冲突期间强化纪律。

title: FIFA tweaks yellow-card ban rules ahead of WC
summary: FIFA has expanded its yellow card amnesty rule for the 2026 World Cup to reduce suspensions during knockout rounds. The modification aims to keep key players available during crucial elimination-stage matches.
content: FIFA has expanded its yellow card amnesty rule for the 2026 World Cup, aiming to reduce player suspensions during the elimination rounds.

zh.title: FIFA在世界杯前调整黄牌禁赛规则
zh.summary: 国际足联扩展了2026年世界杯的黄牌赦免规则，以减少淘汰赛阶段的禁赛。这一修改旨在在至关重要的淘汰赛阶段保持主力球员的可用性。

title: Iran absent as FIFA meetings start before WCup
summary: Iran's soccer federation did not send representatives to a major AFC leadership meeting ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The absence marks a notable diplomatic moment during pre-tournament coordination among Asian nations.
content: Representatives from Iran's soccer federation were not present Tuesday at the largest formal meeting of Asia's soccer leaders before this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 伊朗缺席2026世界杯前的国际足联会议
zh.summary: 伊朗足协未向2026年世界杯前召开的亚足联领导层主要会议派遣代表。这一缺席在亚洲国家赛前协调期间标志着一个值得注意的外交时刻。

title: Ødegaard: Title-chasing Arsenal in 'amazing positi...
summary: Arsenal captain Martin Ødegaard expressed confidence that his team is positioned to make a stronger title challenge this season. The midfielder believes the club has the quality and momentum to compete for the Premier League crown.
content: Arsenal skipper Martin Ødegaard has said his side are ready to go a step further in the title race.

zh.title: 厄德高：争冠的阿森纳处于"惊人的位置"
zh.summary: 阿森纳队长马丁·厄德高表达了对球队本赛季能够发起更强大争冠挑战的信心。这位中场球员相信俱乐部有能力和势头争夺英超冠军。

title: PSG vs. Bayern was one of the greatest matches Cha...
summary: PSG and Bayern Munich produced an exceptional 5-4 Champions League semifinal encounter that showcased attacking brilliance from both sides. The high-scoring result left the tie balanced as neither team achieved a decisive advantage.
content: European giants PSG and Bayern Munich produced one of the greatest games you'll ever see. Yet neither will be happy at a 5-4 score that keeps the tie hanging in the balance.

zh.title: PSG对拜仁是欧冠历史上最伟大的比赛之一
zh.summary: PSG和拜仁慕尼黑在欧冠半决赛中呈现了一场5-4的精彩对攻，展现了双方出色的进攻能力。高比分的结果使得双方势均力敌，谁都没有获得决定性优势。

title: VAR review: Were Bayern wronged by PSG penalty awa...
summary: A VAR-reviewed penalty decision in favor of PSG against Bayern Munich may have been the decisive moment in the 5-4 semifinal encounter. The handball call drew scrutiny from observers questioning its accuracy.
content: PSG were awarded a potentially decisive penalty for a Bayern Munich handball in a match for the ages.

zh.title: VAR审核：拜仁是否因PSG点球判罚遭冤？
zh.summary: 一项对PSG有利的点球判罚决定可能是这场5-4半决赛的转折点。这个手球判罚引起了观众的质疑和讨论。
